title: Asanthus squamulosus

Asanthus (Tetragonia tetragonioides) has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of Asanthus (Tetragonia tetragonioides) include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Asanthus (Tetragonia tetragonioides) include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions.
